ddls:
CREATE TABLE "cron_jobs" (
  "job_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cron job */,
  "job_name" TEXT /* Name of the cron job */,
  "command" TEXT /* Command to be executed by the cron job */,
  "cron_expression" TEXT /* Cron expression specifying the schedule */,
  "server_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the server where the job will run */,
  "application_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the application associated with the job */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the job was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the job was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the job (e.g., active, inactive, paused) */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the job configuration */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category the job belongs to */,
  "dependency_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dependency associated with the job */,
  "retry_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the job should be retried in case of failure */,
  "retry_interval" INTEGER /* Interval between retries */,
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* ID of the notification associated with the job */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("job_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cron_jobs_server_id FOREIGN KEY ("server_id") REFERENCES servers ("server_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cron_jobs_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES job_categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cron_jobs_application_id FOREIGN KEY ("application_id") REFERENCES applications ("application_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cron_jobs_dependency_id FOREIGN KEY ("dependency_id") REFERENCES dependencies ("dependency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "servers" (
  "server_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each server */,
  "server_name" TEXT /* Name of the server */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the server */,
  "environment" TEXT /* Environment where the server operates (e.g., production, staging, development) */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the server */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("server_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "applications" (
  "application_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each application */,
  "application_name" TEXT /* Name of the application */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the application */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team responsible for the application */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("application_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_applications_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the team belongs to */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the role associated with the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., email, SMS) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the notification was sent */,
  "recipient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the recipient */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message content of the notification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_recipient_id FOREIGN KEY ("recipient_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dependencies" (
  "dependency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dependency */,
  "job_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cron job */,
  "dependent_job_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dependent cron job */,
  "dependency_type" TEXT /* Type of dependency (e.g., AFTER, BEFORE) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dependency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dependencies_job_id FOREIGN KEY ("job_id") REFERENCES cron_jobs ("job_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dependencies_dependent_job_id FOREIGN KEY ("dependent_job_id") REFERENCES cron_jobs ("job_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "job_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "job_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "job_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cron job */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the job configuration */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the version was created */,
  "changes" TEXT /* Changes made in this version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_job_versions_job_id FOREIGN KEY ("job_id") REFERENCES cron_jobs ("job_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "execution_history" (
  "execution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each execution event */,
  "job_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cron job being executed */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the job started */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the job ended */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the job execution (e.g., success, failure, running) */,
  "output" TEXT /* Output of the job execution */,
  "error_message" TEXT /* Error message if the job failed */,
  "retry_attempt" INTEGER /* Number of retry attempts made for the job */,
  "error_code" INTEGER /* Error code associated with the job execution */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("execution_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_execution_history_job_id FOREIGN KEY ("job_id") REFERENCES cron_jobs ("job_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cron_expression_details" (
  "expression_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cron expression component */,
  "job_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cron job the expression belongs to */,
  "field_num" INTEGER /* Number of the field in the cron expression */,
  "field_name" TEXT /* Name of the field (e.g., second, minute, hour) */,
  "field_value" TEXT /* Value of the field */,
  "allowed_values" TEXT /* Allowed values for the field */,
  "field_description" TEXT /* Description of the field */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("expression_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cron_expression_details_job_id FOREIGN KEY ("job_id") REFERENCES cron_jobs ("job_id")
)
